name: Bloomberry Resorts Corporation
summary: Bloomberry Resorts Corporation, through its subsidiaries, develops and operates hotels, casinos, and integrated tourism resorts in the Philippines and Korea. The company develops tourist facilities, such as casino-entertainment complexes with casino, hotel, retail and amusement areas, and themed development components. It also owns and operates the Solaire Resort & Casino, a hotel and gaming resort comprising floor area of approximately 18,500 square meters; 1,653 slot machines; 295 gaming tables; 88 electronic table games; 488 hotel rooms, suites, and bayside villas; 15 specialty restaurants; and food and beverage outlets, including 240 seat Chinese restaurant, 182 seat Korean restaurant, 150 seat Japanese restaurant, 120 seat Italian restaurant, 322 seat international buffet/coffee shop, 170 seat noodle shop, 150 seat live entertainment lounge, 406 seat food court, 20 seat lobby bar, and a 50 seat lounge area, as well as multilevel parking building with approximately 1,500 parking slots, a spa and fitness center, and bayview promenade. In addition, the company owns and operates the Sky Tower that consists of a 312 all-suite hotel; 10 VIP gaming salons with 66 gaming tables and 230 slot machines; bar for gamers; 8 meeting rooms with an area of 2,000 square meters of meeting facility, and 2 boardrooms and pre-function area; a lyrical theater with 1,760 seats; 2 restaurants, the Waterside Restobar and Oasis Garden Caf√É¬©; shooting club with 5 rifle shooting bays and 15 pistol bays; and multi-level parking garage. Further, it operates Jeju Sun Hotel & Casino, including 202-rooms, and 2,000 square meters of gaming operation with 36 tables and 20 electronic gaming machines, as well as 4 food and beverage outlets; and cruise terminals. The company is based in Paranaque City, the Philippines. Bloomberry Resorts Corporation is a subsidiary of Prime Strategic Holdings, Inc.
